title: Best Vegan Enchiladas
rawBody:
- **URL:** https://www.noracooks.com/vegan-enchiladas/ ✓ VERIFIED
- $2.65/serving · **Menu price:** $14–17 · 360 g · 540 cal · 18 g · 60 min · 6 · **Easy** (assemble, gratinée) · 🥘
- **Premium:** Beyond Beef filling +$1.30 / Chunk Pulled +$2.00

title: Birria Tacos
rawBody:
- **URL:** https://dorastable.com/vegan-birria-tacos/ ✓ VERIFIED
- **Description:** Soyrizo or jackfruit braised in adobo; fried-dipped tortillas with vegan oaxaca + consomé.
- $3.20/serving · **Menu price:** $14–17 (3 tacos + consomé) · 320 g · 540 cal · 22 g · 90 min · 6 · **Medium** (per-plate dip-fry) · 🥘 ⚡
- **Premium:** Chunk Pulled in birria adobo +$2.20 — strong upsell
description: Soyrizo or jackfruit braised in adobo; fried-dipped tortillas with vegan oaxaca + consomé.

title: Chilaquiles Rojos
rawBody:
- **URL:** https://www.isachandra.com/2017/02/chilaquiles-rojos/ ✓ VERIFIED
- $2.10/serving · **Menu price:** $12–15 · 340 g · 480 cal · 14 g · 30 min · 4 · **Easy** (sauce holds) · 🥘 ⚡

title: Pozole Rojo
rawBody:
- **URL:** https://www.dorastable.com/vegan-red-pozole/ ✓ VERIFIED
- $1.85/serving · **Menu price:** $12–15 · 420 g · 380 cal · 14 g · 90 min · 6 · **Easy** · 🥘 ⚡
description: Hominy and jackfruit in a guajillo-ancho-arbol chile broth, topped with shredded cabbage, radish, and oregano. The vegan rebuild reads as real-deal posole — hold-and-finish friendly.

title: Tortilla Soup
rawBody:
- **URL:** https://www.loveandlemons.com/tortilla-soup-recipe/ ✓ VERIFIED
- $1.40/serving · **Menu price:** $8–11 (cup) / $11–14 (bowl) · 320 g · 290 cal · 9 g · 35 min · 6 · **Easy** · 🥘 ⚡
description: Tomato-and-dried-chile broth ladled over crispy tortilla strips, finished with avocado and lime. Sopa azteca, plant-based — quick build from a held base.

title: Mole Poblano
rawBody:
- **URL:** https://www.dorastable.com/vegan-mole-poblano/ ✓ VERIFIED
- $3.40/serving (mole + protein) · **Menu price:** $19–24 · 320 g · 540 cal · 22 g · 3+ hr · 8 · **Easy** (sauce is the whole point — bulk-prep heaven) · 🥘 ⚡
- **Premium:** Chunk Pulled or Beyond Chicken Pieces in mole +$2.00 — converts plate to upscale tier
description: Easy — sauce is the whole point — bulk-prep heaven · bulk-prep, fast-service.
difficultyNote: sauce is the whole point — bulk-prep heaven

title: Churros con Chocolate (Sin crueldad)
rawBody:
- **URL:** https://brokebankvegan.com/easy-vegan-churro-recipe/ ✓ VERIFIED *(Loving It Vegan does NOT have a churros recipe — Broke Bank Vegan's version is the closest match: Spanish-style, fried, with dark-chocolate-and-coconut-milk dipping sauce)*
- **Description:** Choux-style dough piped through a star tip and fried to order, rolled in cinnamon-sugar, served with thick Spanish-style hot chocolate (oat-milk + dark cocoa). Bridges Mexican and Spanish menus naturally; dramatic per-plate fry, low cost, high check-add.
- **Wholesale food cost:** $1.45 / serving (4–5 churros + chocolate cup) · **Menu price:** $7–10
- **Weight:** 140 g · **Calories:** 420 · **Protein:** 5 g · **Time:** 35 min (dough rests; fry per ticket) · **Servings:** 4
- **Restaurant difficulty:** **Medium** — pipe-and-fry per ticket (4 min); chocolate sauce holds in a bain.
- **Tags:** ⚡ Fast-Service (chocolate is 🥘)

| Sub | Effect | Cost delta |
|---|---|---|
| Standard churro (default) | Classic | baseline |
| Filled churro (dulce de leche / vegan caramel) | Upsell | +$0.60 → menu $9–12 |
| Add vegan vanilla ice cream | Combo dessert | +$0.80 → menu $9–12 |
urlNote: Loving It Vegan does NOT have a churros recipe — Broke Bank Vegan's version is the closest match: Spanish-style, fried, with dark-chocolate-and-coconut-milk dipping sauce

difficultyNote: pipe-and-fry per ticket (4 min); chocolate sauce holds in a bain.
